title: Duct
description: Duct: A duct object is a passageway which conveys material (typically air)

StartPoint.description: The point at which the Duct object begins. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

EndPoint.description: The point at which the Duct object ends. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

FlowRate.description: The volume of fluid being conveyed by the Duct per second (m3/s).

SectionProperty.description: The Duct section property defines the shape (round, rectangular, ovular) and its associated properties (height, width, radius, material, thickness/gauge).

OrientationAngle.description: This is the Duct's planometric orientation angle (the rotation around its central axis). Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
